milestones.title: P4B Analysis Hardening
milestones.description: Stabilize the new analysis layer with sparse matrix outputs, outcome harmonization, resumability, and scale benchmarks.

milestones.title: P5 Cross-Domain Graph
milestones.description: Build compound-substance-assay-target graph workflows with provenance and deterministic cross-domain joins.

milestones.title: P6 Interop + ML Contracts
milestones.description: Harden ecosystem bridges (rcdk/ChemmineR/Bioconductor) and schema-stable ML pipeline contracts.

milestones.title: P7 Productization Layer
milestones.description: Deliver Shiny/cloud execution profiles, pluggable cache backends, and run telemetry.

milestones.title: P8 Governance + v3 Release
milestones.description: Finalize lifecycle/deprecation policy, compatibility matrix, API contract snapshots, and v3.0 release readiness.
